name: Avocado Soup with Salsa Fresca
recipeIngredient: Sea salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Push the avocados through a fine sieve. Place the avocado puree in a mixing bowl.
2. Add the lime juice to the avocado puree.
3. Gradually add the chicken stock, stirring constantly until thoroughly blended with the broth.
4. Slowly add the crema while continuing to stir until smooth and creamy.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Chill the soup until cold and serve in chilled bowls.
7. Pass the Salsa Fresca as a garnish.
Yield: 4 servings
